title: Fragrance Candle in Glass Cup – Aromatic Long Burn Wax Candles, 160g French Classic Soy Candle with 23.5 Hour Burn Time | Decorative Scent Candles for Home Bath, Relaxation, Sleep, Spa, Women, Gift
features: Rose Ebony Fusion: These scented candles for home achieve a floral woody balance, enriching the bedroom atmosphere with an elegant oriental profile that serves as a romantic space accent, making them perfect for setting a soothing mood in any room

Gourmand Cheerful Notes: The scented candle releases balanced fruity creamy scent with a sweet vanilla finish, creating an energizing citrus awakening that enhances the social occasion atmosphere, perfect for gatherings and celebrations while uplifting moods

Elegant Glass Craftsmanship: Encased in handcrafted glass, the aromatherapy candle projects decorative light patterns, making it an ideal centerpiece for table art displays while adding classical elegance to any space

Natural Ingredient: These fragrancetherapy candles utilize clean-burning soy wax to provide an even fragrance diffusion, creating a soothing environment without harmful lefts, making them great for use in homes where safety is important during relaxation periods

Long-Lasting Fragrance: Scented candles provide 24-hour lasting aroma supported by rich fragrance layers and a patchouli sandalwood foundation, enabling a calming atmosphere ideal for meditation and relaxation while enhancing the sensory environment

Designed to promote relaxation and enhance restfulness, it serves as the perfect companion for unwinding after a busy day. The soothing scents make it ideal for aromatherapy practices, creating a calming atmosphere in your living space. Whether used during the holiday season, as a thoughtful Christmas or birthday gift, or simply to enhance everyday moments, this candle adds a touch of warmth and tranquility. Its carefully selected fragrance appeals to women seeking comfort and balance in their homes. Welcome the spirit of relaxation with this outstanding candle for women, designed to elevate your well-being naturally and elegantly.
